name: Allego Sales Learning API
what_it_does: Allego REST API for sales learning and enablement platform. Enables AI agents to manage learning content, track completion and assessment scores, access coaching video libraries, sync user and team data, and integrate Allego's sales readiness data into CRM and HRMS workflows. Allego focuses on video-based sales coaching and modern learning for revenue teams.
use_cases: Syncing user learning progress and certifications from HR and CRM integration agents
Managing sales training content libraries from learning operations agents
Tracking sales readiness scores from revenue enablement analytics agents
Integrating Allego coaching data into sales performance platforms from automation agents
not_for: General enterprise LMS without sales focus
Non-sales team learning management without video coaching needs
best_when: A sales organization using Allego wants AI agents to sync learning completion, certifications, and readiness data with CRM and HR systems, or to automate content assignment based on performance gaps.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Sales coaching videos may contain recordings of individual sellers. API credentials provide access to employee learning records.

auth.notes: Allego uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials flow for API access. Access tokens are short-lived. API access requires enterprise plan and developer access request.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per seat; API access included with enterprise plan
pricing.notes: Enterprise sales enablement pricing. API access requires enterprise tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per application; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Sales coaching videos contain recordings of individual employees
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API requiring developer access request
API documentation is limited — enterprise support engagement typically required
API access requires enterprise plan — not available on lower tiers
Sales-specific data model — learning content organized around sales competencies
OAuth client credentials flow — implement token refresh for long-running agents
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee coaching video recordings. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. Enterprise-only API — limited public documentation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee learning records and coaching videos. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. Enterprise-only with limited public documentation.
